imagePromptTemplate:
A highly photorealistic image of a person based strictly on the provided reference image(s).

IDENTITY SOURCE (ABSOLUTE PRIORITY)
The uploaded reference image(s) define the ENTIRE identity of the subject. The model must extract and preserve all identity features directly from the reference.

This includes:
- exact face structure and proportions
- exact eye shape, size, and color
- exact skin tone and undertone
- exact hair color, texture, and style
- exact age appearance
- exact facial details (asymmetry, features, natural imperfections)

The generated subject must be the SAME exact person as the reference image, not a variation, not an interpretation.

CONSISTENCY RULES (CRITICAL)
- Do NOT change identity under any condition
- Do NOT average or generalize the face
- Do NOT beautify, enhance, or stylize the face
- Do NOT alter ethnicity, gender, or age
- Do NOT modify facial proportions or symmetry
- Do NOT reinterpret lighting in a way that changes identity
- The face must match the reference even under different angles or environments

If multiple reference images are provided:
- Treat them as the SAME person from different angles
- Combine them to form a more accurate and consistent identity
- Do NOT average into a new face

OUTFIT
{outfit}

- Must be applied onto the SAME person from the reference
- Clothing must fit naturally on the body
- Do NOT change body proportions to fit clothing

ENVIRONMENT / BACKGROUND
{background}

- Place the SAME person into the new environment
- Maintain realistic perspective, lighting, and depth
- Environment must not alter identity appearance

BODY CONSISTENCY
- Maintain the same body type, proportions, and posture style as the reference
- Do NOT slim, exaggerate, or reshape the body

CAMERA & LIGHTING
- Photorealistic camera behavior
- Natural lens (35mm–85mm equivalent)
- Lighting must remain realistic and must NOT change perceived identity (especially skin tone and eye color)

STYLE
- Photorealistic
- Natural skin texture (no smoothing or plastic skin)
- No stylization or artistic reinterpretation

NEGATIVE CONSTRAINTS (STRICT)
- No identity drift
- No face morphing
- No feature enhancement
- No AI artifacts
- No extra fingers or anatomy errors
- No cartoon, anime, or stylized rendering
- No generic face substitution

OUTPUT GOAL
The result must look like the SAME real person from the reference image, placed into a different outfit and environment, with zero identity drift.
videoPromptTemplate:
Animate the person from the provided input image into a short, realistic video.

IDENTITY LOCK (ABSOLUTE PRIORITY)
The subject must remain EXACTLY the same person as the input image.

- Preserve identical facial structure, proportions, and features
- Preserve exact eye color, skin tone, and hair
- No beautification, no stylization, no reinterpretation
- No identity drift during motion or speech
- The face must remain consistent across ALL frames

Any deviation from the original identity is not allowed.

SCENE
{background_or_scene}

- Environment must remain stable and realistic
- No warping or shifting background
- Lighting must remain consistent and natural

OUTFIT
{outfit}

- Must match the input image exactly
- No changes or reinterpretation during motion

MOTION
{motion}

Movement must remain smooth, grounded, and physically realistic.

DIALOGUE
{dialogue}

Tone: conversational, unscripted, relaxed and confident, not overly polished or ad-like. Keep it short (1–2 sentences). Dialogue must match natural speaking rhythm.

CAMERA
- handheld smartphone style (UGC feel)
- eye-level framing
- slight natural micro-movements
- no cinematic over-stylization

LIGHTING
- natural lighting only
- must not change skin tone or eye color
- consistent across frames

AUDIO
- natural voice sync
- no robotic tone
- subtle ambient sound allowed

CONSISTENCY RULES (CRITICAL)
- no face morphing during speech
- no eye color shift
- no body proportion changes
- no outfit changes
- no object deformation (if product present)
- no flickering or frame inconsistency

OUTPUT GOAL
A realistic, natural UGC-style video of the SAME person from the input image, with varied dialogue and subtle movement, while maintaining perfect identity consistency.
